summary: Iteration 2 testing of new features: messaging, profile edit, reference image upload, PWA. Backend: 9/10 passed (1 skipped - no studio for owner). Fixed critical bug in get_current_user (user_id was None for JWT users). All UI features working.

critical.issue: FIXED: get_current_user returned dict without 'id' or 'user_id' field for email-registered users (MongoDB _id excluded, no id field in user doc). Caused 500 error with sorted([None, str]). Fix: added user['id'] = user_id from JWT payload when neither id nor user_id present.

issues: First conversation shows 'Nutzer' as name for demo_owner_1 recipient (not a real user in DB). Expected behavior for demo data.

action_items: No critical action items - all features working after the get_current_user fix
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: get_current_user did not inject 'id' field into returned user dict for email-registered users (only _id excluded but no id field stored). This caused user_id=None in all endpoints using current_user.get('id'). Fix was to add user['id'] = payload sub when no id or user_id present.
BookingCreate model uses 'reference_images' (list) not 'reference_image_url' (string) - frontend sends list correctly
Studio owner test account (studioowner@inkbook.com) still not pre-seeded with a studio - requires manual creation to test profile edit tab
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (get_current_user fix - inject user id from JWT payload)
seed_data_creation: Created Test Profile Studio for studioowner@inkbook.com via API (studio_fa1e05f9ff66)
mocked_apis: Email via Resend is MOCKED - RESEND_API_KEY empty, emails are only logged not sent
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 new features tested and working: 1) Messages/Chat UI fully functional with real-time polling, 2) Nachrichten nav link and customer dashboard card working, 3) Studio kontaktieren button on studio page works for logged-in users, 4) Reference image upload (REFERENZBILDER section) appears after selecting date+time slot, 5) Studio profile edit tab (Profil bearbeiten) works with style toggles, gallery upload, save button. Critical backend bug fixed: get_current_user now injects id from JWT payload. Email notifications are MOCKED (no RESEND_API_KEY).
rca_of_issues: Root cause of POST /api/messages 500: user documents inserted via email registration don't store 'id' or 'user_id' as explicit fields - only MongoDB ObjectId _id. When get_current_user fetches user with {'_id': 0}, _id is excluded, leaving no id field. All endpoints using current_user.get('id') or current_user.get('user_id') got None. Fix: inject user_id from JWT payload['sub'] into the returned user dict when no id or user_id field present.
